ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "churned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has churned (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "dependent_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependents associated with the customer */,
  "months_on_book" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been active */,
  "months_inactive_12_mon" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been inactive in the past 12 months */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address for mailings */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender for demographic analysis */,
  "income" REAL /* Customer's annual income for financial analysis */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Customer's highest level of education for demographic segmentation */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Customer's marital status for demographic segmentation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Customer's occupation for understanding income and financial behavior */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the service for tenure analysis */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last customer activity for engagement analysis */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment for segmentation analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the transaction */,
  "total_revolving_bal" REAL /* Total revolving balance of the customer */,
  "total_trans_amt" REAL /* Total amount of transactions in the reporting period */,
  "total_trans_ct" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the reporting period */,
  "avg_utilization_ratio" REAL /* Average utilization ratio of the customer's credit */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction for time-series analysis */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, purchase) for detailed financial analysis */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant involved in the transaction for category analysis */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., groceries, entertainment) for spending pattern analysis */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred for geographical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, meeting) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or summary of the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., call center, email, in-person) for channel effectiveness analysis */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes for efficiency analysis */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., issue resolved, follow-up required) for quality assessment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the interaction for agent performance analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., high-risk, loyal customers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristics of the segment */,
  "targeted_marketing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the segment is targeted for marketing campaigns */,
  "segment_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy for engaging with the segment (e.g., loyalty programs, discounts) */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of customers in the segment for scale analysis */,
  "segment_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the segment for trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report, typically as a JSON or CSV string */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., churn, engagement, financial) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report for accountability */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated for version control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer owning the credit profile */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_history_length" INTEGER /* Length of the customer's credit history in months for risk assessment */,
  "number_of_open_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts the customer has for financial analysis */,
  "total_debt" REAL /* Total debt of the customer for financial health analysis */,
  "delinquency_rate" REAL /* Rate of delinquency in the customer's payment history for risk assessment */,
  "last_credit_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last credit check for up-to-date risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, support) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name for personalization */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name for personalization */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department for role-based access control */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login for security and compliance */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created for audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn analysis record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer being analyzed */,
  "risk_factor" TEXT /* Identified risk factors associated with potential churn */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended actions to reduce churn risk */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the churn analysis was conducted for time-series analysis */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the risk of churn for prioritization */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommended actions (e.g., pending, completed) for follow-up */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the analysis for context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
